title: Career Earnings Potential Quiz - Are You Maximizing Your Income? | CrunchMilk
metaDescription: Assess your career earnings potential with this free 8-question quiz. Evaluate your skills, industry, negotiation habits, and growth trajectory.
tagline: Are you earning what you're actually worth?

questions.question: What is your highest level of education or professional certification?

options.text: High school diploma or less
Associate degree or some college
Bachelor's degree
Advanced degree (Master's, PhD, MD, JD) or high-value certifications

questions.question: How in-demand is your industry and role in today's job market?

options.text: My field is shrinking or being automated
Stable but not growing significantly
Growing field with good demand for my skills
High-growth industry with talent shortage (tech, healthcare, skilled trades)

questions.question: When was the last time you negotiated your salary or rates?

options.text: I've never negotiated - I accept what's offered
I tried once but didn't push hard
I negotiate when changing jobs
I negotiate regularly and have market data to support my ask

questions.question: How often do you invest in developing new, marketable skills?

options.text: I haven't learned a new professional skill in years
Occasionally, when my employer requires it
I pursue 1-2 new skills or courses per year
I continuously learn and stay ahead of industry trends

questions.question: How strong is your professional network?

options.text: I barely know anyone outside my immediate team
I have some professional contacts but don't maintain them
I have a solid network and attend industry events occasionally
I have a strong network I actively maintain, with mentors and sponsors

questions.question: Do you have multiple income streams or the ability to create them?

options.text: Just my primary job with no side income potential
I occasionally do side work but nothing consistent
I have one additional income stream (freelance, rental, etc.)
Multiple income streams or highly monetizable skills outside my job

questions.question: Are you in a geographic market that supports high earnings for your role?

options.text: I'm in a low cost-of-living area with limited opportunities
Average market with typical pay for my field
Good market or I work remotely for companies in higher-paying areas
Top-tier market (major metro or remote with top-market pay)

questions.question: What's your trajectory - are you moving up, laterally, or stagnating?

options.text: I've been in the same role and pay range for 5+ years
Slow progression with occasional small raises
Steady advancement with promotions every 2-3 years
Fast-track growth with strategic career moves and accelerating income

scoreRanges.label: Untapped Potential
scoreRanges.analysis: You're likely leaving significant earnings on the table. Start by researching what others in your field earn, invest in a high-demand skill, and practice salary negotiation. Even one strategic move could boost your income substantially.

scoreRanges.label: Room to Grow
scoreRanges.analysis: You have a foundation but aren't fully capitalizing on your potential. Focus on building your network, negotiating at your next opportunity, and developing skills that command premium pay in your industry.

scoreRanges.label: Strong Trajectory
scoreRanges.analysis: You're on a solid growth path. To accelerate further, consider building additional income streams, targeting leadership roles, and ensuring you're in the best market for your skillset - whether geographically or by going remote.

scoreRanges.label: Maximizing Potential
scoreRanges.analysis: You're firing on all cylinders with high-demand skills, strong negotiation habits, and strategic career management. Keep diversifying income streams and mentoring others - your network and reputation are now your most valuable assets.
